prompt_en: A cold mercy ending where medicine crates and rescued patients leave through sea fog while abandoned proof and damaged routing gear remain behind in silence. radio mast, cold storage, sea fog, archival realism, delayed guilt. medicine crates, rescued patients, sea fog, abandoned proof, damaged routing gear. Grounded Korean apocalypse cinematic realism.
prompt_ko_context: 사람을 우선해 의약품과 환자를 살리지만 다른 것을 포기하는 엔딩.
camera_notes: Center the rescued bodies and medicine first, then show the cost in what must be left behind.
audio_notes: Blanket rustle, distant generator, softened strings, winter wind.
stitch_prompt: A cold mercy ending where medicine crates and rescued patients leave through sea fog while abandoned proof and damaged routing gear remain behind in silence. Match style pack P3.ending.p3_end_cold_mercy.
